heading: Acquisition of property
label: 1765d Acquisition of property
text: Upon the request of the Secretary of Agriculture, the Secretary of State may use the authorities contained in the Foreign Service Buildings Act, 1926 [ et seq.], to acquire sites and buildings, including living quarters, for the purpose of establishing United States Agricultural Trade Offices.22 U.S.C. 292
notes: References in TextThe Foreign Service Buildings Act, 1926, as amended, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to chapter 8 (§ 292 et seq.) of Title 22, Foreign Relations and Intercourse. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act May 7, 1926, ch. 25044 Stat. 403section 299 of Title 22
